hero.subtitle: A proprietary TradingView strategy built for Bitcoin traders who are tired of losing to their own decisions. Structured entry criteria. Hard-coded risk limits. Consistent execution — regardless of what the market is doing.
hero.tagline: Stop trading your emotions. Start trading a system.
note.title: Why most traders underperform their own strategy:
note.desc: It's rarely the analysis that fails. It's the moment the position goes red and you override the plan. Or the moment a big green candle makes you double your size. The framework exists to take that moment away from you entirely.
features1.title: Three Things That Break Most Traders — Solved
features1.contentDesc: Every decision the strategy makes is traceable back to a predefined rule. There is no gray area, no discretionary override, no 'feel' required.

features1.items.title: No More Chart Paralysis
features1.items.description: The strategy evaluates market structure through a fixed technical framework — the same way, every time. You stop asking 'does this look right?' because the system has already answered that question.

features1.items.title: Built for Volatile Markets, Not Despite Them
features1.items.description: Bitcoin doesn't trend cleanly. The framework identifies high-probability structural setups and stays flat during low-quality, choppy conditions — preserving capital for the moments that actually count.

features1.items.title: Execution That Doesn't Hesitate
features1.items.description: When the criteria are met, the trade fires. When they aren't, nothing happens. No waiting for confirmation that never comes. No chasing entries because you missed the first signal.

features2.contentTitle: Risk Management That Actually Has Teeth
features2.contentDesc: Most strategies define entries. Few define exactly how wrong you're allowed to be — and what happens when you get there.

features2.items.title: Position Size Is Never Negotiable
features2.items.description: Risk per trade is calculated from your configured parameters before the order is placed. The strategy doesn't care how good the setup looks — the exposure stays within bounds.

features2.items.title: Flat When the Market Is Noise
features2.items.description: Ranging, choppy, or directionless markets are the primary account killers for active traders. The strategy detects these phases and reduces activity automatically — not reactively.

features2.items.title: Risk Profiles You Control
features2.items.description: Conservative, moderate, or aggressive — the core parameters are configurable to match your account size and personal drawdown tolerance, without compromising the underlying logic.

steps.title: Three Steps from Signal to Execution
steps.subtitle: The entire process runs inside TradingView. No external servers, no black box, no signal subscription required. You see exactly what the strategy sees — and why it acts.

steps.items.title: The Indicator Reads the Market
steps.items.description: On every completed bar, the proprietary indicator evaluates price structure against its internal model. A signal only emerges when multiple independent conditions align simultaneously — not on a single trigger.

steps.items.title: The Risk Engine Validates the Signal
steps.items.description: Before anything is placed, the signal is checked against your configured risk parameters: is the market phase appropriate? Is the position size within limits? Is there an existing open position? All conditions must pass.

steps.items.title: The Order Is Placed — Exactly As Defined
steps.items.description: Entry, stop-loss, and take-profit levels are placed in a single atomic action. Nothing is left to manual interpretation after the signal fires.

chart.title: Tested Across Bull Markets, Bear Markets, and Everything Between
chart.subtitle: The backtest covers multiple full Bitcoin market cycles. The goal was never to find the most impressive number in isolation — it was to find settings that hold up across different volatility regimes without falling apart.
testimonials.title: What Happens After You Stop Trading on Feel

testimonials.items.name: Alex M.
testimonials.items.testimonial: I've tried three other strategies before this. The difference is I actually follow this one. When it's a rule, I don't argue with it. My revenge trading is gone — not because I got more disciplined, but because the system removed the decision.

testimonials.items.name: David K.
testimonials.items.testimonial: What I respect most is what it doesn't do. It doesn't trade during the chop phases that wiped me out in 2023. I missed some moves sitting in cash, but I also missed the three 8% drawdowns in between. That trade-off is worth it.

testimonials.items.name: Sophie L.
testimonials.items.testimonial: I was skeptical of anything with 'automated' in the description. But the transparency here is different — I can see the logic, I can see the trades, I understand why each position was taken. It feels like a methodology, not a mystery.

cta.title: Your Next Trade Doesn't Have to Be a Guess.
cta.subtitle: The framework is ready to deploy on your TradingView chart today. Seven days free. Cancel anytime. No ambiguity.
